_comment: This file shows the JSON form. If your Continue install reads YAML, the equivalent
Merge the `experimental.modelContextProtocolServers` block into your existing
~/.continue/config.json (Continue has many other top-level keys — do not overwrite).
Reload Continue (VS Code: 'Continue: Reload Window' from the command palette).
Two variants below in the array: index [0] is local stdio (free + paid via env);
index [1] is hosted HTTP at mcp.catetus.com (paid only). Pick ONE; delete the other.
FREE TIER (stdio, no key): analyze, list_presets, list_scenes, get_scene,
PAID TIER (key set): also encode, score_fidelity, repack, predict_quality,
recommend_preset, batch_jobs, list_jobs. Get a key at https://catetus.com/dashboard.

modelContextProtocolServers._comment: FREE + PAID via stdio. Omit the env block to use the free tier only.
modelContextProtocolServers.name: catetus

modelContextProtocolServers._comment: Alternative: hosted HTTP. Delete the stdio entry above (index [0]) and keep only this one to use it.
modelContextProtocolServers.name: catetus
